title: Ruin Your Virgin Experience of 10 Today
display_title: Ruin Your Virgin Experience of 10 Today
wikitext:
[]: Ruin Your Virgin Experience of 1.0 Today! Post by Zuggy » Fri Dec 28, 2007 8:56 am This thread is split from the "Spoilers" one; I'm locking the other threads that are about the camrip. Keep it all here. -Reichu There's a camrip of the second half of the film in the torrents section of That Board. Edit: Spoilers - Having watched it, it really is a scene-for-scene reproduction! It's very dark in terms of colour compared to the original series. On the elevator down into terminal dogma Shinji and Misato pass through a room filled with enormous organs hanging in pink stuff like how the Reiquarium looked after Ritsuko destroyed the Rei clones. It was nice to see how the pilots actually put the plugsuits on (the neck ring splits into two pieces). The best bit though was the fight with Ramiel. Kaworu is literally standing before the Moon Giant when he gets out of his coffin btw, it doesn't take place in the past or any of the other theories in the moon giant thread here. Can't wait for it to come out on DVD so I can buy that and see it at full quality!

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 1:19 pm The... second... half. -_- I'm watching it now. It's close enough to the original to still make sense without having seen the fist half. I think a lot of the darkness of the color has to do with the camera that's filming it not being able to pick up everything without sufficient lighting.

[]: Post by Zuggy » Fri Dec 28, 2007 1:32 pm If the second half is out it must mean the first is as well, it's just a matter of finding it. After the video has finished downloading into the webplayer, go into your cache (if you're using firefox) and copy/paste the file into My Documents or whatever, give that file a .avi extension so you can watch it anytime you want without downloading it again (you never know when the videos might get pulled down, either). Would it be all right to directly link the videos here or is that against the forum's rules 'cause it's copyrighted?

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 1:45 pm I just finished watching it (minus the preview for the next movie). The fight against Ramiel was great even with crappy lighting, low-quality sound, and compression artifact squares all over the place. I loved the little creepy touches such as (SPOILERS) Lilith's twitching legs and Ramiel's shrieks.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Dec 28, 2007 1:57 pm Not being well versed in the world of anime outside of the rudimental knowledge I have (I'm obsessed with Eva and in turn a huge GAINAX fan and a few other titles but most anime names slide by me without a clue of what they mean)- Could someone post a link to where this camrip can be found. I don't even know what "That Board" is? Thanks.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 2:00 pm Yeah, it took me a while to figure out what "that board" was as well until someone posted a link to something on it, not realizing it was forbidden. Part 1 http://tokyo3cn.com/bbs/thread-11264-1-1.html Part 2 http://tokyo3cn.com/bbs/thread-11265-1-1.html I've already mentioned what Yamaga said about GAINAX's lax copyright stance (he said that it's fine to download fansubs and such as long as you support the company by buying the DVDs if you like it). I'm going to go ahead and assume Khara's the same way for now, but just to be safe: BY CLICKING ON THE ABOVE LINKS, YOU ARE LEGALLY OBLIGATED TO BUY EVANGELION 1.0: YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE ON DVD.

[]: Post by Zuggy » Fri Dec 28, 2007 2:08 pm I think you should wait for word from the higher ups before linking to those. A PM is fine too. If you don't know where That Board is try putting Rei Ayanami into Google, it's on the first page (the reason we can't link to it is because it's full of porn).

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 2:12 pm Meh, I'll take them down if I need to. I think I know Aaron and Rachel's attitudes well enough to assume that it'll probably be allowed, but if not I'll just be told to take them down. No permanent damage will be d-AAHGHH! OH GOD! NOOO!! AAUUGRH!! BLUAARULGHH!!!! CALL THE POLI---- *Cough, sputter* Ugh.

[]: Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Dec 28, 2007 2:19 pm Your part 1 is part 1 of part b. I mean, Part B1 and then there's part B2

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 2:23 pm AchtungAffen wrote: Your part 1 is part 1 of part b. I mean, Part B1 and then there's part B2

[]: Post by Zuggy » Fri Dec 28, 2007 2:27 pm He's complaining that the movie doesn't start from the beginning (part A). The first half of the movie isn't online yet, there isn't a part A1 or A2 on the tokyo3 site linked previously at least. Click the link near the top of the page that has tokyo3 in it for the forum index, and check that for when part A is uploaded, should have one of those little attachment paperclips next to the thread title.

[]: Post by universalperson » Fri Dec 28, 2007 2:46 pm I only watched the tail end of it, because I had to see the Kaworu scene and the previews. Quick, someone get screencaps, because I don't know how! Based on the previews, you can really call the next movie "Attack of the Evas". Would be funny if half of them end up being possesed by Angels or piloted by Angels. Eva-06 looks...interesting. And by intresting I mean "It has a red visor". Kaworu is seen in his plug suit, but Asuka is also featured, so I wouldn't be suprised if Shinji has to interact with them both...at the same time.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 6:34 pm http://www.tokyo3cn.com/bbs/attachment.php?aid=14087 A higher-resolution version in AVI form is available for download here.

[]: Post by Wevangeliwon » Fri Dec 28, 2007 6:49 pm NAveryW wrote: http://www.tokyo3cn.com/bbs/attachment.php?aid=14087 A higher-resolution version in AVI form is available for download here.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 7:04 pm I didn't have to register.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Dec 28, 2007 9:28 pm Good God, Ramiel really cooks him this time! And that bastard Gendo just sits and watches, saying "Damedesu." Rebuild Ramiel is every bit as awesome as Ornette said.

[]: Post by Szmitten » Fri Dec 28, 2007 9:34 pm I for one will continue to restrain myself and wait for the DVD rip and subs.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Dec 28, 2007 9:42 pm "Dainin no Shito"=="Second Angel", am I right? Whoever said Lilith was the First in Rebuild? :?

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 10:08 pm The official poster.

[]: Post by Avatar of Dreams » Fri Dec 28, 2007 10:30 pm So is the first part simply not uploaded yet?
